_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: thettasch-samxl
data.message:
Set REACH_PLUGINS variable using an env hook (#47)

* Set REACH_PLUGINS variable using an env hook

* Use ament helper and project name token

* Add explicit export, which is not covered by ament_append_unique_value

* Use dsv hooks for better portability

* Fix formatting with .run-cmake-format

data.author: nikhil-sethi
data.message:
Add dockerfile and compose files (#44)

* Add dockerfile and compose files

* Add and test the demo compose file

* Add ipc=host to allow ros comm between containers

* Cleanup args and version

* Update service name to reach_ros

* Add rviz2 as dependency for the demo

* Parameterize the ros distribution for the dockerfile

* Add a ci job for docker

* Updated docker job to run on foxy, humble and jazzy to match other CI jobs

* Call `rosdep update` with EOL distributions argument

---------

Co-authored-by: Michael Ripperger <michael.ripperger@swri.org>

data.author: LoyVanBeek
data.message:
Remove extraneous backtick (#10)

* Remove extraneous backtick

* Fix path where rosdep references `src` directory

There is not `src` directory in the `reach`, rosdep should be called from the catkin workspace root
